main.description: A subject for a Survey. Belongs to a single Protocol.

scope.description: One or more scope criteria defining the subject.

taxonScope.description: A taxonomic criterion for a survey target.

taxonID.description: Identifier for the target taxon, preferably a stable URI, e.g. https://www.gbif.org/species/102151594.

scientificName.description: Full scientific name without rank modifiers.

vernacularName.description: Common or vernacular name for the taxon, following dwc:vernacularName. Set by the protocol author as the preferred label shown to surveyors.

taxonRank.description: Taxonomic rank, e.g. family, genus, subspecies, variety.

kingdom.description: Taxonomic kingdom. Combined with scientificName and taxonRank, provides disambiguation for most homonyms.

verbatimScope.description: A free-text criterion for cases not covered by structured types (sensu Humboldt eco:verbatimTargetScope).

verbatimTargetScope.description: Free-text description of what is being targeted, e.g. 'trees > 10 cm DBH'.
